title: hymenophyllum oligosorum
intro: Hymenophyllum oligosorum, also known as the mountain button fern, is a type of small, delicate fern that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum oligosorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in natural remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
